summary: Completed backend testing for Zuba House Mobile App. External API connectivity verified, local proxy functional, file structure complete.

minor_issues.issue: CORS headers missing or incomplete in local proxy
minor_issues.impact: May cause issues with cross-origin requests from mobile app

minor_issues.issue: Mobile app config uses /api/cart but actual endpoint is /api/cart/get
minor_issues.impact: Cart functionality may fail in mobile app

minor_issues.issue: Mobile app config uses /api/order but actual endpoint is /api/order/order-list
minor_issues.impact: Order listing may fail in mobile app

typescript_issues.issue: Variable used before declaration and API response type mismatch
HeadersInit type not found, Object.fromEntries not available
typescript_issues.impact: Type compilation warnings - may indicate outdated lib target

passed_tests: Backend API Health Check - External Zuba API healthy
Local Backend Proxy Health Check - Proxy running correctly
File Structure Validation - All required files exist with proper content
API Endpoint Connectivity - Products, Categories, Auth endpoints working
Proxy Forwarding - Local proxy correctly forwards to external API
TypeScript Compilation - App compiles despite warnings
Mobile App Build - Web build starts successfully

critical_fixes: Update mobile app API_ENDPOINTS config to use correct cart endpoint (/api/cart/get instead of /api/cart)
Update mobile app API_ENDPOINTS config to use correct orders endpoint (/api/order/order-list instead of /api/order)
recommended_fixes: Add proper CORS headers to local backend proxy for mobile app compatibility
Fix TypeScript compilation warnings in HomeScreen.tsx and api.ts
Update tsconfig.json lib target to include es2019+ for Object.fromEntries support
Fix Button component props in LoginScreen.tsx
